## IAT 410 - Video Game Design and Programming

Chris Shaw, Ph.D.

### IGF Student Showcase

- Selects 10 Student Showcase Winners
- $500 travel stipends per game
- Show their game at GDC March 2007
- $2,500 Best Student Game award

### Past Winning Games

- XenoHammer - IGF Student Showcase 2002
- DOGgone CATastrophe - IGF Student Showcase 2003
- KubeKombat - IGF Student Showcase 2004
- Growbot - IGF Student Showcase 2004
- TeamRobot - IGF Student Showcase 2005

### Context

The preserved slide deck references XenoHammer as an example of a past IGF Student Showcase winner in a university game-design course context.
